entries.question: How many sick leaves do I get?
entries.answer: Employees are entitled to 12 sick leaves per year. Unused sick leaves cannot be carried forward to the next year.

entries.question: What is the maternity leave policy?
entries.answer: Maternity leave is granted for 26 weeks. Additional provisions are available for high-risk pregnancies with a doctor's certificate.

entries.question: How many casual leaves do I get?
entries.answer: Employees get 15 casual leaves per year. Up to 5 unused casual leaves can be carried forward to the next year.

entries.question: What is the work from home policy?
entries.answer: Employees can work from home up to 2 days per week with manager approval. Full remote work requires HR and department head approval.

entries.question: How do I apply for leave?
entries.answer: Login to the HR portal, go to Leave Management, select leave type and dates, and submit for manager approval. Apply at least 2 days in advance for planned leaves.

entries.question: How do I reset my password?
entries.answer: Go to the IT support portal, click Forgot Password, enter your company email and follow the instructions sent to your registered email.

entries.question: How do I install company software?
entries.answer: Open the Software Center on your device, search for the required software and click Install. For unlisted software, raise an IT support ticket.

entries.question: What should I do if my computer won't start?
entries.answer: Check if the power cable is properly connected. Press the power button for 10 seconds, wait and try restarting. If the issue persists contact IT support immediately.

entries.question: How do I connect to company VPN?
entries.answer: Download the VPN client from the IT portal, install it, enter your employee credentials and select the nearest server. Contact IT if you face connection issues.

entries.question: How do I report a technical issue?
entries.answer: Raise a ticket on the IT support portal with a detailed description of the issue. For urgent issues call the IT helpdesk at extension 1234.

entries.question: What is the code of conduct?
entries.answer: Employees must maintain professional behavior, respect colleagues, protect company data, and comply with all company policies. Violations may result in disciplinary action.

entries.question: How do I report a policy violation?
entries.answer: Report violations through the HR portal under the Compliance section or contact the compliance officer directly at compliance@company.com.

entries.question: What is the office timing?
entries.answer: Standard office hours are 9 AM to 6 PM Monday to Friday. Flexible timing of plus or minus 1 hour is allowed with manager approval.

entries.question: What is the dress code policy?
entries.answer: Business casual attire is required Monday to Thursday. Fridays are casual dress days. Client meeting days require formal business attire.

entries.question: When is the next town hall?
entries.answer: Town halls are held every quarter. The next town hall is scheduled for the last Friday of this month. Check the company calendar for exact timing.

entries.question: How do I register for company events?
entries.answer: Visit the company intranet Events section, browse upcoming events and click Register. You will receive a confirmation email with event details.
